text.tspan: A walkable and progressive economic hub driven by investment and tourism by
loving, empowered, educated, healthy and disciplined citizens
proud of their cultural heritage and natural wonders guided by inclusive growth,
pment under a transparent, innovative, and accountable
To serve as the catalyst for inclusive and sustainable local development by
creating an enabling environment for investment, tourism, and enterprise growth. We
are committed to empowering our citizens through responsive programs, transparent
d strong partnerships that uphold cultural pride, protect natural
being and prosperity of every constituent.
Be at the forefront of watching
Senior Citizens, pregnant women, children and
happy clients by addressing service delays with explanations.
To all this we pledge and commit, keeping in mind that we are at all times accountable
